action.reasoning: Observation: the last inspection output confirmed predict.py's current two-ViT ensemble but still did not reveal train.py's exact argument names/seed options. Analysis: a third diverse ViT checkpoint is the most promising remaining improvement, but I need the precise CLI before launching a ~20 minute run to avoid wasting an iteration on an argument error. Decision: run a concise `train.py --help` inspection only, then use the confirmed arguments for a new seed/variant run next.

command_output.stdout:
usage: train.py [-h] [--arch ARCH] [--num_classes NUM_CLASSES]
                [--num_tasks NUM_TASKS] [--epochs_per_task EPOCHS_PER_TASK]
                [--joint_epochs JOINT_EPOCHS] [--batch_size BATCH_SIZE]
                [--val_batch_size VAL_BATCH_SIZE] [--workers WORKERS]
                [--lr LR] [--weight_decay WEIGHT_DECAY]
                [--min_lr_ratio MIN_LR_RATIO] [--warmup_frac WARMUP_FRAC]
                [--label_smoothing LABEL_SMOOTHING] [--mixup MIXUP]
                [--cutmix CUTMIX] [--mix_prob MIX_PROB]
                [--erase_prob ERASE_PROB] [--clip_grad CLIP_GRAD]
                [--ckpt_dir CKPT_DIR] [--seed SEED] [--no_pretrained]
                [--balanced_sampler] [--channels_last]

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --arch ARCH
  --num_classes NUM_CLASSES
  --num_tasks NUM_TASKS
  --epochs_per_task EPOCHS_PER_TASK
  --joint_epochs JOINT_EPOCHS
  --batch_size BATCH_SIZE
  --val_batch_size VAL_BATCH_SIZE
  --workers WORKERS
  --lr LR
  --weight_decay WEIGHT_DECAY
  --min_lr_ratio MIN_LR_RATIO
  --warmup_frac WARMUP_FRAC
  --label_smoothing LABEL_SMOOTHING
  --mixup MIXUP
  --cutmix CUTMIX
  --mix_prob MIX_PROB
  --erase_prob ERASE_PROB
  --clip_grad CLIP_GRAD
  --ckpt_dir CKPT_DIR
  --seed SEED
  --no_pretrained
  --balanced_sampler
  --channels_last
